description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a prominent A-frame roof on the main structure and a flat-roofed extension, likely serving as a carport or garage. The exterior is clad in wood paneling, giving it a warm, natural appearance, while large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The building sits on a spacious wooden deck that extends from the front, providing an outdoor living area. The side and rear elevations are more solid, with minimal window openings and a focus on privacy. The flat-roofed extension includes a small, raised structure, possibly a skylight or vent. The overall form is geometric and clean, emphasizing simplicity and functionality in an urban residential context.
description: A modern wood-clad bungalow with an A-frame roof, large front glass windows, and a flat-roofed carport extension, set on a spacious wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the A-frame roof, large glass windows, wooden deck, and attached flat-roofed carport.
description_view_1: Direct view of the carport extension and side of the bungalow, highlighting the flat roof and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid wood-clad wall of the A-frame section and the rear of the carport, with a single door visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the A-frame roof and the wooden deck, with no visible windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front-facing windows with minimal side openings
